      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Atftahj tawus Bahri-
nug/ tad paturrefchu es tohs
Dsihwug/ un tawas Atraitnes
laid us mannim ferre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Jo ta fakka tas KUNGg:
Nangi/ kurr eem ta Teesa ne irr
nospreedusi to Bifkeri dsert/ tee
dsers/ woj tu taptu bes Nosee-
Dsibas nenoseedstigß turrechts?
Tu ne tapti nenoseedstigß tur-
rehts/ bet teefcham dserti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Jo es etimu pee fewis pa-
fcha swehrejs/ fakka tas KUNGg:
Ka Bozrai buhs tapt var Js-
trubzinaschannu/ par Neewascha-
nu/ par pohstu Weetu/ un par
Labstu/ un wiſfi winnas Pills-
fahti taps par muhschigahm
Tukfnefehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. Es esmu weenu Slawn
dirdejs no ta KUNGA/ un
Wehsti irr starp teem Pagaxeem
fuhtiti/ fapulztinajtees/ un nah-
zeet klaht prett winnu/ un zel-
Icetees Karra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Jo reds/ es esmu tewi
masu darrijs starp teem Paga-
xeem/ nizzinatu starp teem Zil-
wekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Tawa Gresniba/ un tawa
Sirđs Lepniba irr tewi peewih-
Inti/ kas tu dsihwo eeksch Akmi-
na Kalnu Plaisumeem/ un tur-
rajs us angsteem Pakalneem.
Jepfchu tu tad tawu Ligson tik
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "augstu darritu ka Ehrglis:
mebr es tewis no turrenes
gruhdtichu/ fakka tas KUNGg
pohstu Weetu/ wiſs/ das n
nam fezzen eer/ breihnofees/
Amispchis pahr wiffahm wi
Mohkahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Jtt ka Sodoma uu
morra ar faweem Katminceeu
apgahsta/ fakka tas KUNGg
Tur ne dsihwohs netveens/
neweens Zilweeka Behrns mit
eeksch ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Jo rangi/ wiſsch n
angfcham ka Lauwa no ta
pluhduicha Jardana/ prett t
ftipreem Dsihwolteem/ jo es
schu winnu no turrenes pe
fchi fezzeht. Un ( ko jinn )
tas Jauneklis irraid/ ko es p
tewi eezelschu? Jo kas irr t
es? un kas weddihs manni
ta? un kurfch irr tas Gang/
manna Dreekfcha * ftabweb
* Tas. irr: Kas man fchinni Leeta
pohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Tapehz klausajt ta Kl
GA Padohmu/ ko wiſsch
Eedomu irr tadohmaje/un n
na Dohmag/ ko wiſsch irr
dohmaje pahr teem Eedsh
tajeem no Teemana. Tee-
tee Masakee no ta gaun
Pulka tohs nohsimettibs/ u
pohstibs winna Mahjas-W
pahr winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Ta Semme trihfehe
tahs Brakfchkefchanas wi
Krischanas/ ta Kleegfchana /
"
